top_signals.title: LDP, JIP and DPP seek emergency clause in Constitution
top_signals.summary: The LDP's Yoshitaka Shindo said, "If a state of emergency coincides with an election period, how will we run the country?"
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
